name: 7.5 MG Zopiclone Tablets BP
about: 7.5 MG Zopiclone Tablets BP is a general medicine that is manufactured in India. This medicine is available in the form of tablets and is used for insomnia treatment. The recommended dosage of this medicine should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. The tablets should be kept in a dry and cool place to maintain their effectiveness. Each box of this medicine contains 2x5x10 tablets.
